summary: Iteration 35 - Catalog Expansion Batch 1 testing (35 → 78 procedures). All 20 backend tests passed. All frontend tests passed. Catalog expanded from 35 to 78 procedures across 6 categories. New 'lavoro' category added with 5 procedures.
critical_code_review_comments: catalog_data.py correctly expanded from 35 to 78 procedures with full enriched structure
All 6 categories have correct counts: fiscale(24), previdenziale(12), societario(13), documentale(12), informativo(12), lavoro(5)
New 'lavoro' category properly defined in CATALOG_CATEGORIES in server.py
No duplicate practice_id values found across the entire catalog
11 procedures correctly have url_verified=false for unverified portals (SUAP, INAIL, Centro per l'Impiego, IMU, Interpello, Rateizzazione)
All official procedures have full enriched structure: category, procedure_type, official_action, auth_method, proof_expected, flow_definition, who_acts, estimated_duration, document_specs
ServicesPage.jsx correctly references 'lavoro' in AREAS catalogCategories for 'planning' and 'entities' areas
seed_data_creation: Catalog was re-seeded with 78 procedures (DB: aic_database)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 35 tested Catalog Expansion Batch 1. All tests passed. Key verified: (1) GET /api/catalog returns 78 procedures total. (2) GET /api/catalog/categories returns 6 categories with correct counts (fiscale:24, previdenziale:12, societario:13, documentale:12, informativo:12, lavoro:5). (3) New 'lavoro' category exists with 5 procedures (ASSUNZIONE_DIP, CESSAZIONE_DIP, TRASFORMAZIONE_CONTRATTO, BUSTA_PAGA, CONGUAGLIO_FISCALE). (4) All new fiscale procedures exist (MOD_770, IRAP_DECLARATION, RAVVEDIMENTO, IVA_RIMBORSO, etc.). (5) All new previdenziale procedures exist (INPS_UNIEMENS, INPS_F24_CONTRIB, INPS_MATERNITA, INPS_NASPI, INAIL_AUTOLIQ, INAIL_DENUNCIA, INPS_COLF_BADANTI). (6) All new societario procedures exist (VAT_OPEN_SOCIETA, DEPOSITO_BILANCIO, NOMINA_AMMINISTRATORE, MODIFICA_STATUTO, CESSIONE_QUOTE, PEC_OBBLIGATORIA, ISCRIZIONE_REA, TRASFORMAZIONE_SOCIETARIA). (7) Each new procedure has full enriched structure. (8) No duplicate practice_id values. (9) 11 procedures have url_verified=false. (10) Services page shows updated procedure counts. (11) Catalog page shows all 78 procedures with correct category filtering.
